ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Tick value indicating the time point of the experiment */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Run number of the experiment session */,
  "random_seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for the experiment's setup */,
  "year" REAL /* Year the experiment was conducted */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ecological community studied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_number" INTEGER /* Number representing the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecological community */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the community is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Indicates whether data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the sample is associated with */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., water, sediment) */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the metric pertains to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., species richness, average cover) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the quality refers to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being evaluated (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of authors */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the publication was released */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name (binomial nomenclature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment where the species was encountered */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species encountered */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Abundance of the species */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the species */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the encounter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_encounters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_encounters_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_design" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment using this design */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Type of experimental design (e.g., RCT, quasi-experimental) */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Description of the treatment applied */,
  "control" TEXT /* Description of the control condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_design_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "software" TEXT /* Software used for the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment where the interaction occurred */,
  "species1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first species involved in the interaction */,
  "species2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second species involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., predation, symbiosis) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_interactions_species2_id FOREIGN KEY ("species2_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_interactions_species1_id FOREIGN KEY ("species1_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_interactions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
